requirement_topic.en: Senegal standards and customs entry governance
requirement_topic.zh: 塞内加尔标准与入境治理
requirement_topic.zht: 塞內加爾標準與入境治理

summary.en: Senegal applies import checks through ASN-guided standards references and Ministry of Trade PEC/VoC flow controls. Market access is importer-led and often processed via Dakar port customs channels.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔通过ASN导向标准依据和商务部PEC/VoC流程实施进口检查。市场准入通常由进口商主导，并以达喀尔口岸海关渠道处理。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾透過ASN導向標準依據和商務部PEC/VoC流程實施進口檢查。市場准入通常由進口商主導，並以達喀爾口岸海關渠道處理。

standards_or_laws: ASN standards references and NS/IEC adoption

summary.en: China uses GB/GB-T based domestic rules and CCC where applicable. These are important for Chinese domestic compliance but do not represent the full Senegal entry mechanism.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/GB-T国内制度并按目录执行CCC。该制度对中国国内合规重要，但不能完整覆盖塞内加尔入境机制。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/GB-T國內制度並按目錄執行CCC。該制度對中國國內合規重要，但不能完整覆蓋塞內加爾入境機制。

gap.en: There is no direct single battery law equivalent in this lane. CN certificates are baseline evidence only; Senegal still requires importer-level mapping to PEC/ASN. Senegal does not show EU-style horizontal RoHS or battery passport regimes here.
gap.zh: 该场景下没有单一可对应的电池法律体系。CN证书只是底层证据，塞内加尔仍要求按进口商将其映射至PEC/ASN流程。该场景未见欧盟式横向RoHS或电池护照制度。
gap.zht: 該場景下沒有單一可對應的電池法律體系。CN證書只是底層證據，塞內加爾仍要求按進口商將其映射至PEC/ASN流程。該場景未見歐盟式橫向RoHS或電池護照制度。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical check via PEC/VoC and importer-led controls for regulated products.
mandatory_status.cn: CN domestic compliance is mandatory domestically, not structurally equivalent to Senegal release obligations

source.publisher: ASN and Senegal Ministry of Trade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CNGB/CCC helps engineering baseline, but importer-led ASN/PEC processing and French documentation are the decisive compliance points for Senegal.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CNGB/CCC有助于工程基线，但塞内加尔的决定性点在于进口商主导的ASN/PEC流程和法文文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CNGB/CCC有助於工程基線，但塞內加爾的決定性點在於進口商主導的ASN/PEC流程和法文文件。
